name: Liminal Village
tagline: Regenerative living lab at the intersection of ecology, technology and community
description: Liminal Village is a rural innovation hub near Varese, Italy, focused on regenerative agriculture, decentralized technologies, and communal living experiments. It hosts seasonal residencies for researchers, artists and builders working on sustainability challenges.

spaces.name: Permaculture Garden
spaces.notes: 1.5 hectare permaculture garden with demonstration zones

spaces.name: Maker Shed
spaces.notes: Woodworking, electronics and small-scale fabrication tools

spaces.name: Community Kitchen
spaces.notes: Professional-grade kitchen for communal cooking and food workshops

accommodation.notes: Up to 18 residents at a time. Mix of private rooms and shared dormitories.

assets.name: Solar Array
assets.notes: 12kW solar installation covering 80% of energy needs

challenges.title: Scale food production for self-sufficiency
challenges.problem_description: Current garden output covers about 40% of community food needs.
challenges.expected_solution: Structured crop rotation plan, additional greenhouse capacity, and automated irrigation systems.

challenges.title: Develop onboarding program for new residents
challenges.problem_description: New arrivals often lack context about community norms and project workflows.
challenges.expected_solution: A structured onboarding guide, mentor buddy system, and weekly orientation sessions.
